member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.IPseudonymService
member.summary: Contract for generating deterministic pseudonyms using HMAC-SHA256. Pseudonyms are generated on-the-fly with no caching or storage required.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.IPseudonymService.Generate``1(``0,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Generates pseudonyms for the specified users under the provided scope. Pseudonyms are deterministically generated using HMAC-SHA256, so the same combination of aggregate and user will always produce the same pseudonym.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.IPseudonymService.Generate``1(``0,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a pseudonym for a single user under the specified aggregate type and ID. Pseudonyms are deterministically generated using HMAC-SHA256, so the same combination of aggregate and user will always produce the same pseudonym.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.PseudonymService
member.summary: Provides deterministic pseudonym generation using HMAC-SHA256.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.PseudonymService.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Options.IOptions{BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.Configuration.PseudonymityConfiguration},Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger{BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Application.Services.PseudonymService})
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymGenerator
member.summary: Generates context-scoped pseudonyms using HMAC-based deterministic generation.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymGenerator.GeneratePseudonym(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Generates a deterministic pseudonym using HMAC-SHA256 with the pattern: adjective-noun-word. The same combination of inputs will always produce the same pseudonym.
member.returns: A deterministic pseudonym for this combination of inputs.
member.exception: Thrown when any parameter is null or whitespace.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymGenerator.GetIndexFromHash(System.Byte[],System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Extracts a deterministic index from hash bytes using modulo arithmetic.
member.param: The hash bytes to extract from.
The offset in the hash to start reading.
The maximum value (exclusive) for the index.
member.returns: An index in the range [0, maxValue).

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymWordLists
member.summary: Provides word lists for pseudonym generation using a word-based approach.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymWordLists.Adjectives
member.summary: Collection of positive and neutral adjectives for pseudonym generation.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymWordLists.Nouns
member.summary: Collection of common nouns for pseudonym generation.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymWordLists.Verbs
member.summary: Collection of action verbs for pseudonym generation.

member.name: F:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Domain.PseudonymWordLists.CombinedThirdWords
member.summary: Combined collection of nouns and verbs for the third word position. Pre-computed to avoid allocations during pseudonym generation.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.PseudonymityAssemblyReference
member.summary: Marker surface for MediatR assembly registration for Pseudonymity.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.PseudonymityAssemblyReference.Assembly
member.summary: Gets the assembly that contains MediatR handlers for the Pseudonymity bounded context.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.Configuration.PseudonymityConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration options for the Pseudonymity service.

member.name: P:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.Configuration.PseudonymityConfiguration.HmacSecretKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the HMAC secret key used for deterministic pseudonym generation. This should be a secure random string that is kept secret.

member.name: T:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.PseudonymityServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: DI registration for the Pseudonymity service.

member.name: M:BindingChaos.Pseudonymity.Infrastructure.PseudonymityServiceCollectionExtensions.AddPseudonymity(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Adds Pseudonymity services to the container.
